description: This file defines the AppTheme class which provides theme configurations for a Flutter application, including color schemes, text styles, and widget themes.

classes.name: AppTheme
classes.description: A utility class providing theme data and color constants for a Flutter application.

methods.name: light
methods.description: Returns a ThemeData object configured for a light/modern app theme.

methods.name: success
methods.description: Returns the color used for success accents.
